day3_bumps.type: Short thread reply (reply to original email thread)
day3_bumps.template:
[First name],

Just wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

[One sentence restating specific signal — e.g. 'The Not Secure warning on [URL] is still showing.']

[Your name]
day3_bumps.rules: 3-4 lines only. Same thread. Brief bump — do not restate the full pitch. IMAP check before each.

day7_new_angle.type: New pain point. Fresh email — NOT a thread reply. New subject line.

pivot_rules.if_day0_was_ssl: Day-7: Google ranking impact of Not Secure, OR missing/incomplete Google Business Profile. NEVER repeat SSL angle.
pivot_rules.if_day0_was_mobile: Day-7: SSL (if HTTP), OR missing tap-to-call, OR specific competitor who IS mobile-friendly.
pivot_rules.if_day0_was_no_website: Day-7: competitors ranking for keyword, OR estimated missed enquiries per month.
pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a genuinely different pain point. Tom's conversion (Batch 1) came from a new angle — not a reframe.

day7_new_angle.brain_run_required: Wednesday 2026-05-13 morning — BRAIN generates per-lead Day-7 copy.

day14_breakup.type: Breakup email — clean close, door left open.

If things change, you know where I am.

All the best,
[Your name]
day14_breakup.rules: 3 lines maximum. No new content. No pressure. No question marks.
